label: Transparent passionfruit flower and fruit motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Passionfruit transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a passionfruit flower and fruit motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A tropical passionfruit vine with an ornate white-and-purple passionflower, radial violet filaments, green tendrils and leaves, one purple passionfruit, and one cut fruit showing yellow pulp and dark seeds. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, expressive flower detail, unmistakably passionfruit.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include flower, vine tendril, whole fruit, cut fruit, and leaves without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no fig, no plum, no orchid-only flower, no generic tropical flower, no plate, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Passionfruit light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Passionfruit", derived from the visible passionfruit flower and fruit cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible expressive identity UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Passionfruit, Passionfruit Flower and Fruit, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from purple passionfruit rind, yellow pulp, dark seeds, white petals, violet radial filaments, green tendrils, and tropical vine leaves. The board must read as passionfruit, not fig, plum, or orchid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, petal-white surfaces, passion-purple primary actions, pulp-yellow highlights, filament-violet accents, vine-green success states, tendril dividers, pulp seed and flower filament texture.
Constraints: no fig identity, no orchid-only identity, no generic purple flower system, no tropical beach imagery, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Passionfruit", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Passionfruit dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Passionfruit". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the passionfruit flower and fruit cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Passionfruit, Passionfruit Flower and Fruit, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve passionfruit system language: passion-purple active states, pulp-yellow highlights, filament-violet accents, petal-cream text, vine-green controls, seed-brown borders, radial flower filament texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as passionfruit, not fig or orchid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: dark rind ink and seed-brown surfaces, petal-cream foreground, passion-purple active states, pulp-yellow chart highlights, vine green focus/control accents, subtle filament and pulp-dot overlays, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no fig identity, no orchid-only identity, no generic purple flower system, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Passionfruit".
